log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Astral Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 7 falling damage. HP: 171/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.

=== ROUND 7 ===
--- Astral Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 7 rounds ===
